creator: yonas@fizk.net
text:
(In reply to Kris Moore from comment #1)

Autodetecting dependencies would be awesome, but I'm not sure how to easily do that. I tried looking at the kernel code in /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_linker.c, but I don't really understand it. The linker_preload() function detects missing dependencies, so if we were able to copy/paste that logic into our own small utility program, that might help.
